titleStmt.title: SII 24.459: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 459. (A.R. No. 375 of 1953-54.) IV. PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL, PROPER RIGHT OF THE ĀRYABHAṬṬĀḶ-VĀŚAL

summary.p: Registers a gift of a village (name lost), exclusive of the lands in it that had been already endowed, as mānya by Viṭṭhaladēva-Mahārāja, son of Timmarasa of Ātrēya-gōtra Āpastamba-sūtra and Yajuś-śākhā, for worship and offerings during the deities' halt at the maṇḍapa at Tandagai in the garden on the 2nd day of the festival and another endowment of some lands in another village (name lost) for daily offerings to god Viṭṭhalēśvara consecrated by the donor in the year Paridāpi(perhaps a mistake). The date Śaka, 1468, Parābhava, Ṛishabha śu. 10, Friday, Uttirāḍam, is irregular. In the year cited Ṛishabha śu. 10 corresponded to 1546 A.D., May 10, but the week-day was Monday and the nakshatra, Uttiram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran rājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvirapratāpa śrīvirasadāśivarāyamahārāyar prithivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā [ niṉṟa śakābdam]
1000 4 100 6 10 8 Itaṉ mel cellā niṉṟa parābhava samvatsarattu ṛṣabha nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu deśamiyum śukra vāramum peṟṟa Uttirāṭa nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭiya kulā
śanivaḷa nāṭṭu viḻāvarāvitivaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkan tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrī paṇṭārattukku svastiśrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvara somakulatilaka
ṉāṉa Ātraiya gotrattu Āpastamba sūtrattu yejuśśākhāddhyāyiyāṉa timmaya devamahārājāviṉ putran viṭṭala devamahārājāven deṇṭaṉ samarpittu śi
lāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Eṉṉuṭaiya Ubhayamāka tantakaiyil Eṉṉuṭaiya toppil maṇṭapa Inta maṇṭapattil
Iraṇṭān tiruṉāḷaikku perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar Eṟi Aruḷi Amutuceytaruḷum kaṭṭaḷaikku tiruviḷaiyāṭṭamāka cetta tiruccilāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭikku cellum teṉkarai
Irācagambhīravaḷaṉāṭṭu Uṟaiyūr kūṟṟattu mel palāṟṟu kiḻaitta grāmam 1kku nāṉ kellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa rūpāy [2 10] prāptippaṭi nāḷatu varai naṭantu varukiṟa dāna
mānyam nikki niṉṟa nañcey puñcey nattam paṭukai tiṭar viḷaiyum Irekaippaṭi
neyyamutu Āka neyppaṭi þ kkuu 1 Amutu cey taruḷukiṟa Amutu Amutu vaṭai 3 100kku pon_ 1pu� cukiyaṉ 3 100kku pon_ 1u 5 veccamutu
6 10kku pon_ pākaik kūṉ 300kku pon_ 1u 5 cempātaḷikai 4 10kku pon_ 10 1u meṟppaṭi 1u 9 pākku veṟṟilai vilaiu 5 cantaṉam paṭi 100kku pon_ 1u 5 Eṟi karumpukkaṭṭu 9 10 kku pon_ § In
ta tharmmapuri Iraṅkayaṅkār peṟṟuvarak kaṭavarākavum Ituvum Ituvum paritāpi varuṣam vaiykāci Intat toppu maṇṭapattil nāṉ pratiṣṭai paṇṇivitta
perumāḷ viṭṭaleśvaraṉum nā nāḷ toṟum niṟṟappaṭiyāka Amutu ceytaruḷum kaṭṭaḷaikku tiruviḷaiyāṭṭamākac cetta tiruccilāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭikku cellum
Uṟaiyūr kūṟṟattu melpalāṟṟu kkuṭikku Uḷppaṭṭa ceṭṭa ṟṟu rūpāy n=ta kku Irekaippaṭi poṉ 2 10u 5kku Amutupaṭi kaṟiyamutu campāram Uḷpaṭṭa vakaikku
kku U Āka varuṣam 1 kku pon_ 2 10 8u 2 cāttiaruḷukiṟa tiruppari vaṭṭam Uḷppaṭṭa vakaikku poṉ 2 10 U 5kku Inta śrī paṇṭāra ttile kaṭṭikko
The rest of the record is covered up.ṇṭu Amutu
Digital edition of SII 24.459 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
